purpose: Authoritative implementation-status addendum for feat work completed in the 2026-07-06 combat/skill/second-wind feat chat. This file marks the feats completed in this chat so future audits do not treat them as unimplemented solely because older sourcebook backlog files were generated before these runtime bridges existed.

statusDefinitions.implemented_correct: Runtime shape matches the feat text closely enough for current system scope and has a known consumer.
statusDefinitions.implemented_with_runtime_boundary: The feat is normalized and consumed by the correct runtime path, but part of the real-table choice, targeting, or map movement remains an explicit UI/GM workflow boundary.
statusDefinitions.metadata_manual_boundary: The feat is intentionally represented as metadata/advisory because the system does not automate that table procedure yet. It should not be counted as not_implemented.

implementedBatches.notes: These were already recorded in docs/feat-implementation-continuation-phase8.json and are restated here to keep the chat-level implementation ledger complete.

implementedBatches.notes: Team Feat skill bonuses prompt for matching allies and are consumed on skill rolls; secondary movement/Aid/vehicle riders are normalized for their relevant runtime seams.
Second Wind feats now resolve through SecondWindRules, second-wind rider normalization, ActorEngine.applySecondWind, and the Forceful Recovery picker where applicable.

feats.name: Regenerative Healing
feats.implementationMode: optional delayed Second Wind rider: suppress immediate healing and record 5 HP/end-of-turn delayed healing payload

feats.name: Resurgent Vitality
feats.implementationMode: extra healing equal to 2 x Constitution modifier, minimum +2

feats.name: Extra Second Wind
feats.implementationMode: +1 daily use, repeatable metadata, first-time Nonheroic eligibility

feats.name: Resurgence
feats.implementationMode: grant immediate Move Action after Second Wind

feats.name: Impetuous Move
feats.implementationMode: optional half-heal movement rider via second wind options

feats.name: Fast Surge
feats.implementationMode: Second Wind action cost becomes free action

feats.name: Recovering Surge
feats.implementationMode: +1 condition track recovery on Second Wind

feats.name: Unstoppable Combatant
feats.implementationMode: ignore encounter cap while daily uses remain

feats.name: Vitality Surge
feats.implementationMode: Second Wind allowed above half HP

feats.name: Forceful Recovery
feats.implementationMode: after Second Wind, modal picker recovers one expended Force power or Lightsaber Form power without spending a Force Point; empty discard pile shows no-valid-powers message and no modal

notes: Entries marked implemented_with_runtime_boundary should not be reclassified as not_implemented; they have normalized rules and runtime seams, but may still depend on explicit sheet prompts, GM targeting, map movement, or future procedure UI.
Entries marked metadata_manual_boundary are intentionally manual/advisory under current project constraints and should not be automated with parallel systems.
